title: Baxter to Present at the 5th Annual Evercore ISI HealthCONx Conference
text: DEERFIELD, Ill.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Baxter International Inc. (NYSE:BAX), a global medtech leader, will present at the 5th Annual Evercore ISI HealthCONx Conference on Thursday, December 1, 2022. Jay Saccaro, Baxter's chief financial officer, is scheduled to present at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time.

title: Baxter Highlights New Home Dialysis and HDx Therapy Data in 14 Clinical Presentations at Kidney Week 2022
text: DEERFIELD, Ill., Nov. 08, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Baxter International Inc. (NYSE:BAX), a global innovator in kidney care, advanced scientific exchange with 14 new data presentations about the role innovation plays in increasing access to and quality of home dialysis and expanded hemodialysis (HDx) care at Kidney Week 2022, Nov. 3-6, Orlando, Florida.
